manifest_analysis.title: Debuggable Application
manifest_analysis.desc: The application is debuggable which allows a malicious user to attach a debugger.

manifest_analysis.title: Insecure Backup Configuration
manifest_analysis.desc: The application allows backups which can expose sensitive data.

niap_analysis.title: Missing SSL Pinning
niap_analysis.description: The application does not implement SSL pinning, making it vulnerable to MITM attacks.
